name: automix
description: Local EDM auto-mixer — orchestration scripts for the backend + frontend monorepo.

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.clean: rimraf backend/.venv backend/.cache backend/.pytest_cache "backend/*.egg-info" frontend/node_modules frontend/dist frontend/.vite
